title: Double-Slit Experiment — Analytical
description: Explore the double-slit experiment with an analytically computed wavefunction. Visualise Copenhagen collapse, Bohmian pilot-wave trajectories, and Many-Worlds branching side by side.

title: Double-Slit Experiment — Numerical
description: Real-time GPU simulation of a Gaussian wave packet propagating through a double slit. Full numerical integration of the time-dependent Schrödinger equation on the browser GPU.

title: Hydrogen Atom
description: Interactive 3D visualisation of hydrogen atomic orbitals. Explore the probability density |ψ_nlm|² for any principal quantum number n, angular momentum l, and magnetic quantum number m.

title: Stern-Gerlach Experiment — 3D
description: Full 3D simulation of a spin-½ particle traversing an inhomogeneous magnetic field. Three interpretations: Copenhagen collapse, Bohmian pilot-wave trajectories, and Many-Worlds branching. Live Born-rule histogram with statistical errors.

title: Free Particle — Gaussian Wave Packet
description: Animated 2D Gaussian wave packet freely propagating and detected at a screen. Compare Copenhagen collapse, Bohmian pilot-wave trajectories, and Many-Worlds branching. Live Born-rule statistics with wave-function–predicted expected counts.

title: Quantum Measurement with Detector
description: Detector-coupled tunneling simulation comparing Collapse/Copenhagen, Pilot-Wave, and Many-Worlds pictures, with explicit detector back-action and outcome statistics.

title: Delayed Choice
description: Bohmian delayed-choice notebook with a balanced splitter, guided trajectories, detector statistics, and an in-flight detector choice.

title: Eigenstates in 3D Box
description: Three-dimensional particle-in-a-box notebook with eigenstate density, nodal surfaces, Pauli spin current, and Bohmian trajectories.

title: Bell Experiment — Entanglement
description: Interactive Bell-pair simulation with angle-dependent correlations, detector-distance timing, and side-by-side Collapse/Copenhagen and Pilot-Wave visualizations, including non-local wave updates.

title: Measurement and Decoherence
description: Simulation of quantum measurement coupled to an environment, illustrating the emergence of classicality through decoherence.

title: Simple Molecules
description: Interactive molecular orbital visualisations for simple molecules such as H₂, LiH, and BeH₂.

title: Scattering and Non-Asymptotic Dynamics
description: Simulation of quantum scattering processes with emphasis on non-asymptotic, finite-time dynamics.

title: Quantum Potential Landscapes
description: Visualisation of the Bohmian quantum potential and its role in guiding particle trajectories through complex geometries.
